text: The subject is located in a neighborhood on the southside of Bloomington, IL. It is a multi-family detached traditional designed two-unit dwelling. It conforms to most other existing 2-4 units in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment. The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Washington St, to the South by Veterans Pkwy, to the East by Hannah St, and to the West by Morris Ave.
